title: mentha × kerneri var. dalmatica
intro: Mentha × kerneri var. dalmatica, also known as Dalmatian pennyroyal or Hungarian pennyroyal, is a subspecies of the mint family with a distinctive aroma and flavor. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and anxiety, due to its essential oils, including menthone and pulegone. The health benefits of Dalmatian pennyroyal include its ability to relieve symptoms of indigestion, nausea, and headaches, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Mentha × kerneri var. dalmatica include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
